title: Red Hat Bug Fix Advisory: lorax-templates-rhel bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for lorax-templates-rhel is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.
description: For detailed information on changes in this release, see the Red Hat Enterprise Linux 9 Release Notes linked from the References section.
affected_products: Red Hat Enterprise Linux for ARM 64
Red Hat Enterprise Linux for x86_64 10 x86_64
Red Hat Enterprise Linux for IBM z Systems
Red Hat Enterprise Linux for Power, little endian

fixes.description: [RHEL-9] Add a menu entry to the boot.iso to boot with fips=1
[rhel-9] "Test this media & install..." is not the default boot option on ppc64le media
[RHEL-9] Typo in a path in runtime-cleanup.tmpl
Drop arm.tmpl and ppc.tmpl from lorax-templates-rhel

full_text:
An update for lorax-templates-rhel is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.

For detailed information on changes in this release, see the Red Hat Enterprise Linux 9 Release Notes linked from the References section.
